description_long: This house features a sprawling, L-shaped footprint with a predominantly flat roof and a low, horizontal profile. The main structure is compact, with a larger wing extending to one side, suggesting a modern, open-plan layout. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, uniform color, likely concrete or stucco, with minimal ornamentation. Windows and doors are sparse and mostly concentrated near the central section, with a few small, rectangular openings visible. The roof is flat and expansive, possibly usable as a terrace or for solar panels. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with clean lines and a focus on function over decorative detail.
description: A modern, L-shaped house with a flat roof, light exterior, and minimal window openings. The design is low-profile and functional, emphasizing clean lines.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry section and the compact central structure with minimal window detail.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long wing extending to the left, emphasizing the L-shaped layout and flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the central structure and the full width of the flat roof, with few visible openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the extended wing and the minimalistic, modern exterior.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with minimal steps, no porch or decorative elements
